summary: Comprehensive testing of Airport Management feature with 452 airports. All backend tests passed (20/20). Frontend testing confirmed pagination (10 pages), search, and display working correctly. Fixed trailing slash issues in 6 frontend API calls.

minor.issue: Comment says 630 entries but AIRPORTS_DATA has 452 - cosmetic mismatch

integration_issues.issue: Trailing slash issues causing 404 errors - FIXED

action_items: Verify frontend trailing slash fixes work in production (auto-deployed via hot reload)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend comment in server.py line 977 says 'AIRPORTS_DATA has 630 entries' but actual count is 452 - should update comment
seed_data_creation: 452 airports auto-seeded on startup from AIRPORTS_DATA
context_for_next_testing_agent: Airport management feature fully working with 452 airports, pagination (50/page = 10 pages), search by name/code/city/country. Login credentials: testuser@demo.com / Test123!. Admin dashboard accessible via footer 'Backend Admin Dashboard' link.

features_tested.pagination: Working - 10 pages with 50 items each, last page has 2 items
features_tested.search: Working - case insensitive, filters by name/code/city/country
features_tested.trailing_slash: Fixed - All APIs work without trailing slashes
features_tested.admin_dashboard_stats: Shows correct counts (452 airports, 28 cities, 4 hotels)

mocked_apis_note: Flight search returns mock data, PayPal and Google Sheets are mocked
